chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1684 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.969/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.695/2025 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 09-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. The matter is fixed today as date-by-Court, as on the last date of hearing, it was adjourned in presence of the Counsel for the Petitioner; even then nobody has turned up to pursue the matter vigilantly. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
